title: Nilgiris under heavy rain warning; landslide risk flagged in Coonoor ghats
summary: The Nilgiris district remains under an IMD heavy rainfall warning today and tomorrow, with landslide-prone zones in the Coonoor and Aravankadu ghat sections under continuous monitoring.

title: Ooty summer festival registration crosses 1.2 lakh visitors mark
summary: Online registrations for the Ooty Summer Festival flower and fruit shows have crossed 1.2 lakh visitor entries, with the festival expected to drive over Rs 200 crore in tourism receipts this season.

title: Nilgiri Mountain Railway resumes full service after track repair
summary: The UNESCO-listed Nilgiri Mountain Railway has resumed full Mettupalayam-Ooty service after monsoon-readiness track repairs along the rack section between Coonoor and Hillgrove.

title: Tea growers welcome auction-price uptick; Coonoor lots fetch premium
summary: Nilgiris tea growers welcomed an average 14 percent uptick in CTC auction prices at the latest Coonoor and Coimbatore Tea Trade Association sessions, attributing the rise to short supply and rupee weakness.

title: Mudumalai records elephant herd movement near Masinagudi during rains
summary: Forest officials have recorded a herd of 28 elephants moving close to Masinagudi habitations during the past 48 hours, prompting precautionary alerts and overnight movement restrictions for tourists.

title: Counting for Coonoor and Udhagamandalam seats centralised in Ooty
summary: Counting for both Nilgiris Assembly seats — Coonoor and Udhagamandalam — has been centralised at a single Ooty venue with redundant power, communication and security arrangements.

title: Toda tribal cooperative wins national craft excellence award
summary: The Toda tribal embroidery cooperative has won the national craft excellence award this year, with central recognition expected to bring an institutional design-school partnership and museum showcase.

title: Nilgiris drinking water quality drive covers 110 tribal hamlets
summary: A district-wide drinking water quality testing drive has covered 110 tribal hamlets across the Nilgiris this month, with corrective filtration units being commissioned at 18 locations identified for upgrades.

title: Kotagiri organic vegetable cluster sees 40 percent buyer order growth
summary: The Kotagiri organic vegetable cluster has seen a 40 percent year-on-year jump in buyer orders, driven by metro-city subscription-box services and direct supply tie-ups with star hotels.

title: Pykara dam reservoir levels rise after pre-monsoon showers
summary: Reservoir levels at the Pykara dam — a key TNEB hydroelectric source — have risen by nearly 18 percent over the past week following pre-monsoon showers across the upper Nilgiris.

title: Ooty civic body bans single-use plastic at Botanical Garden entry
summary: The Ooty Municipal Council has banned single-use plastic items at the Government Botanical Garden gates, with on-site recyclable alternatives provided to tourists from this weekend.

title: Special weekend trains added between Mettupalayam and Coimbatore
summary: Southern Railway has added two pairs of special weekend trains between Mettupalayam and Coimbatore through May 31 to handle peak Nilgiris tourist movement during the summer festival window.
